Input Suffixed

Text input with a suffix addon (right-side element) using <lyte-input> Slyte DOM with a custom suffix wrapper. Supports text, icon, button, and dropdown suffixes.

Form Figma Synced 4 Variants × 3 Sizes
Text Suffix — Right-side text addon
Domain suffix
.com
Unit suffix
kg
Currency suffix
USD
HTML
<!-- Input with Text Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Enter value" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Unit Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Weight" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">kg</span>
</div>

<!-- Currency Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Amount" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">USD</span>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-affixed {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: stretch;
  border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  border-radius: var(--zc-radius-r, 6px);
  background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease;
}

.zc-input-suffix {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 12px;
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-subtle, #F8F8F9);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
  white-space: nowrap;
}
Icon Suffix — Right-side icon addon
Search icon
Calendar icon
Eye icon (password)
HTML
<!-- Input with Icon Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Search..." class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-icon"><i class="fas fa-search"></i></span>
</div>

<!-- Calendar Icon Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Select date" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-icon"><i class="fas fa-calendar-alt"></i></span>
</div>

<!-- Eye Icon Suffix (password toggle) -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Password" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-icon"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i></span>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-suffix-icon {
  padding: 0 10px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.zc-input-suffix-icon:hover {
  color: var(--zc-color-primary-text-primary-text-default, #0D4EF2);
}
Button Suffix — Right-side button addon
Send button
Go button
Apply button
HTML
<!-- Input with Button Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Email" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <button class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-btn">Send</button>
</div>

<!-- Go Button Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Enter URL" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <button class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-btn">Go</button>
</div>

<!-- Apply Button Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Coupon code" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <button class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-btn">Apply</button>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-suffix-btn {
  padding: 0 16px;
  border: none;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-default, #0D4EF2);
  color: #FFFFFF;
  font-family: 'ZohoPuvi', sans-serif;
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  font-weight: var(--zc-p2-font-weight-semibold, 600);
  cursor: pointer;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: background 0.15s ease;
}

.zc-input-suffix-btn:hover {
  background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-default-hover, #0B44D5);
}
States — Focus, Filled, Error, Success
Default
.com
Focus
.com
Filled
.com
Error
.com
Success
.com
HTML
<!-- Default -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Default state" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Focus -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-focus">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Focused input" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Error -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-error">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Invalid value" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Success -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-success">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Valid value" lt-prop-value="mysite" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>
SCSS
/* Focus */
.zc-input-affixed-focus,
.zc-input-affixed:focus-within {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  box-shadow: 0px 2px 2px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.05),
              0px 2px 4px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.08);
}

/* Error */
.zc-input-affixed-error {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
  background: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-subtle, #FEF6F6);
}

/* Success */
.zc-input-affixed-success {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-success-border-success-border-default, #078841);
}
Sizes — SM, MD (Base), LG
SM (28px)
.com
MD — Base (36px)
.com
LG (44px)
.com
HTML
<!-- Small (SM) -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-sm">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Small input" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Medium / Base (MD) — default, no size class needed -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Medium input" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Large (LG) -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-lg">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Large input" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>
SCSS
/* SM — 28px height */
.zc-input-affixed-sm {
  height: 28px;
}
.zc-input-affixed-sm .zc-input-suffix {
  padding: 0 8px;
  font-size: var(--zc-p3-font-size, 12px);
}

/* MD — 36px (default, no class needed) */

/* LG — 44px height */
.zc-input-affixed-lg {
  height: 44px;
}
.zc-input-affixed-lg .zc-input-suffix {
  padding: 0 16px;
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
}
Disabled — Non-interactive
Text suffix disabled
.com
Icon suffix disabled
Button suffix disabled
HTML
<!-- Disabled Text Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-disabled">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Disabled" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix">.com</span>
</div>

<!-- Disabled Icon Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-disabled">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Disabled" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <span class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-icon"><i class="fas fa-search"></i></span>
</div>

<!-- Disabled Button Suffix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-suffixed zc-input-affixed-disabled">
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Disabled" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
    <button class="zc-input-suffix zc-input-suffix-btn" disabled>Send</button>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-affixed-disabled {
  opacity: 0.45;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-disabled, #F5F5F5);
  border-color: var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
}

.zc-input-affixed-disabled .zc-input-suffix-btn {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
